mapper.sql: SELECT sr.reimburse_id, doc_id, start_time, end_time, COALESCE(amount,0)total_amount,COALESCE(ticketTotal,0)ticketTotal, sr.remark, sr.create_by, sr.create_time, sr.update_by, sr.update_time, sr.del_flag FROM sys_reimburse sr LEFT JOIN (SELECT reimburse_id,SUM(amount)amount,SUM(ticket_num)ticketTotal FROM sys_reimburse_detail GROUP BY reimburse_id)srd ON sr.reimburse_id = srd.reimburse_id
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_reimburse
doc_id, start_time, end_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag,
#{docId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag},
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_reimburse where reimburse_id in
#{reimburseId}
mapper.update: update sys_reimburse set process_status = #{processStatus} where reimburse_id = #{reimburseId}
update sys_reimburse set process_status = 'APPROVING',submit_time = NOW() where reimburse_id = #{reimburseId}
mapper.select: SELECT rd.user_name create_by, su.nick_name, CASE WHEN sr.start_time < STR_TO_DATE(#{startMonth}, '%Y-%m-%d') THEN STR_TO_DATE(#{startMonth}, '%Y-%m-%d') ELSE sr.start_time END AS start_time, CASE WHEN sr.end_time > LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(#{endMonth}, '%Y-%m-%d')) THEN LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(#{endMonth}, '%Y-%m-%d')) ELSE sr.end_time END AS end_time, COALESCE(srd.amount,0) total_amount FROM sys_reimburse sr LEFT JOIN remiburse_doc rd ON rd.doc_id = sr.doc_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT reimburse_id,SUM(amount)amount,COUNT(reimburse_id)bills_number FROM sys_reimburse_detail GROUP BY reimburse_id)srd ON sr.reimburse_id = srd.reimburse_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON rd.user_name = su.user_name WHERE start_time <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(#{endMonth}, '%Y-%m-%d')) AND end_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startMonth}, '%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT start_time,end_time FROM sys_reimburse sr LEFT JOIN remiburse_doc sd ON sr.doc_id = sd.doc_id WHERE sd.user_name = #{userName} AND start_time <= LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(#{endDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')) AND end_time >= STR_TO_DATE(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d')
